data.title: Bank of England Survey: UK Firms Expect Price Hikes Amid Middle East Conflict
data.description: A survey released by the Bank of England on Friday indicates that UK businesses anticipate a faster rate of price increases compared to levels before the Middle East conflict, while wage growth is expected to slow. According to Jin10, the Bank of England's regional agents noted in another report that despite concerns over the conflict, 'few firms currently report significant impacts on their output, business activities, and plans.' The survey, conducted from April 2 to 17, involved approximately 2,030 chief financial officers. Since the late February attack on Iran, energy prices have surged and remained high. The survey found that businesses expect prices to rise by 3.8% over the next 12 months, up from 3.5% in March. Companies reported a 3.7% increase in pricing over the year ending in April. Signs of rising inflation expectations are likely to concern Bank of England policymakers, who are set to meet next week to formulate policy, with expectations to maintain the key interest rate at 3.75%.

data.title: Glassnode Reports Bullish Sentiment Among Hyperliquid Whales
data.description: Glassnode has reported that large investors on Hyperliquid have been anticipating a price breakout. According to Foresight News, over the past two months, these investors have shown increased confidence and long positions, indicating a strong bullish sentiment among major perpetual contract traders.

data.title: Glassnode: Hyperliquid whales continue to increase their long positions, indicating strong bullish sentiment among large investors.
data.description: Glassnode posted on the X platform that whales on Hyperliquid have been consistently buying on breakouts, with long positions steadily increasing over the past two months, indicating strong bullish sentiment among large perpetual traders.

data.title: USDD Reports Smart Allocator Investment Returns Surpass $16 Million
data.description: USDD has announced that the cumulative investment returns from its Smart Allocator have exceeded $16 million. According to NS3.AI, the company emphasized that the allocation and performance data for its revenue-sharing mechanism are transparently available on-chain. This transparency aims to provide investors with clear insights into the performance and allocation of their investments.

data.title: KelpDAO Recovers Significant Amount of ETH Following Security Incident
data.description: KelpDAO has announced that since April 18, an initial shortfall of 163,200 ETH was identified. According to Foresight News, KelpDAO has successfully recovered 40,300 rsETH, equivalent to approximately 43,000 ETH. Additionally, the Arbitrum Security Council has retrieved 30,700 ETH, leaving a remaining shortfall of about 89,500 ETH. Confirmed public commitments to address the shortfall include contributions totaling 43,500 ETH from Mantle, Aave founder Stani Kulechov, EtherFi, Lido, and Golem.

data.title: Strive Purchases 137 BTC Following Stock Milestone
data.description: Strive's stock, SATA, reached a nominal value of $100 yesterday, prompting the company to acquire approximately 69 BTC. According to Odaily, over the past two days, Strive has purchased a total of 137 BTC.

data.title: Yara International Reports Higher-Than-Expected Q1 Earnings Amid Hormuz Strait Disruption
data.description: Yara International, a leading fertilizer company based in Oslo, Norway, reported first-quarter earnings that surpassed expectations due to the disruption of shipments through the Hormuz Strait caused by the ongoing conflict in Iran. According to Jin10, the company's adjusted earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization (EBITDA) reached $896 million, marking a 40% increase compared to the same period last year and exceeding analysts' forecasts of $807 million. Revenue for the same period rose by 17%.

data.title: SATA purchased a total of 137 BTC in the past two days.
data.description: Strive's SATA purchased approximately 69 BTC yesterday after reaching a face value of $100. In the past two days, SATA has purchased a total of 137 BTC. (BitcoinTreasuries.NET)

data.title: China Reduces Fiscal Spending Amid Economic Rebound in March
data.description: China reduced its fiscal spending in March as the economy showed signs of recovery at the beginning of the year. Bloomberg posted on X that this decision comes despite the ongoing disruptions caused by the conflict in Iran. The reduction in spending reflects China's strategic adjustment in response to the improving economic conditions, aiming to balance growth with fiscal responsibility. The move indicates a shift in focus as the country navigates the challenges posed by external geopolitical tensions while maintaining domestic economic stability.

data.title: Iranian Foreign Minister Discusses Regional Developments with Pakistani Officials
data.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Araqchi held telephone conversations with Pakistan's Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Dar, as well as Pakistan's Army Chief Munir, to discuss regional developments and ceasefire-related issues. According to Odaily, these discussions were reported by Iran's Tasnim News Agency.

data.title: U.S. SEC to Consider Proposal on Semi-Annual Corporate Reporting
data.description:
U.S. President Donald Trump last year reignited plans for companies to shift from quarterly to semi-annual financial reporting. According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is expected to soon seek public opinion on a proposal to eliminate the quarterly reporting requirement. However, investors and market participants believe that most companies are unlikely to adopt this change, as it could negatively impact company valuations.

Sam Rines, a macro strategist at WisdomTree Asset Management, noted that any company making this transition would likely appear on active investment managers' screening lists and could face reduced holdings or removal from portfolios, or a reevaluation of its valuation. While JPMorgan supports the proposal, it plans to continue providing quarterly guidance through calls with analysts and investors. Mike Reynolds, Vice President of Investment Strategy at Glenmede, anticipates that the vast majority of companies will continue to report quarterly.

data.title: Iranian Foreign Minister speaks with senior Pakistani officials to discuss the current situation.
data.description: According to Iran's Tasnim News Agency, Iranian Foreign Minister Araqchi held separate telephone conversations with Pakistani Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Dar and Pakistani Army Chief of Staff Field Marshal Munir, discussing regional developments and ceasefire-related issues. (Jinshi)

data.title: Iranian official: Trump has no right to criticize Iran.
data.description: Ebrahim Azizi, Chairman of the Iranian Parliament's National Security and Foreign Policy Committee: President Trump, who is facing impeachment by half of Congress, has seen his and his vice president's approval ratings plummet to 18%, and public opinion in the country is divided at 64%. Such a person has no right to criticize Iran. Iran is guided by the participation of its courageous people and the actions of its Supreme Leader! The evil aggressors will surely regret their actions. (Jin Shi)

data.title: Aave Chan founder proposes establishing a savings treasury: using the proceeds to repay Aave's shortfall.
data.description: Marc Zeller, founder of the Aave Chan Initiative (ACI), an Aave ecosystem contribution organization, proposed establishing a depository called "Defi United Eth" instead of initiating donations. He suggested channeling Aave's wETH revenue into this depository, capping the yield at 5% APR, and issuing a tradable deposit token, "AaveETH," to gradually repay interest and principal. He stated that users could deposit ETH into the depository, with the maximum capacity set at the worst-case scenario's total shortfall; he estimated that more funds could have been raised last Saturday. Zeller also claimed that Aave has ample revenue, with both the Aave DAO and Labs holding nine-figure sums in treasury funds.

data.title: USDD Smart Allocator's cumulative investment returns have exceeded $16 million.
data.description: According to official sources, the cumulative investment returns of USDD's Smart Allocator have exceeded $16 million, demonstrating its strong self-sustaining capabilities and further strengthening its long-term competitiveness in the stablecoin sector. Smart Allocator is USDD's yield-sharing mechanism, allowing users to earn interest and platform rewards by participating in high-quality projects, with the returns then being returned to users. This mechanism emphasizes the stability and sustainability of the return source, rather than relying on short-term high-yield strategies. Furthermore, its investment destinations and returns are kept transparent on-chain, allowing users to publicly query and verify them.

data.title: Pakistani officials: The status of the second round of negotiations remains uncertain; they are awaiting a response from Iran.
data.description: Pakistani officials: The status of the second round of negotiations remains uncertain; we are awaiting Iran's response. (Al-Arabiya)

data.title: Both WTI and Brent crude oil prices rose slightly in the short term, currently trading at $99.81 per barrel and $101.4 per barrel respectively.
data.description: Gate data shows that WTI and Brent crude oil prices rose slightly in the short term, currently trading at $99.81/barrel and $101.4/barrel respectively.

data.title: STOCKS | U.S. Chipmakers See Pre-Market Gains Following Intel's Revenue Forecast
data.description: Intel's recent forecast for higher-than-expected second-quarter revenue has led to pre-market gains for several U.S. chip manufacturers. According to Jin10, AMD's stock rose by 7.2%, while Arm experienced a 6.5% increase.

data.title: Chifeng Gold Reports Significant Revenue and Profit Growth in Q1 2026
data.description: Chifeng Gold (06693.HK) announced its financial results for the first quarter of 2026, reporting an operating revenue of 3.554 billion yuan, marking a 47.65% increase compared to the same period last year. According to Jin10, the net profit attributable to shareholders of the listed company reached 988 million yuan, reflecting a substantial year-on-year growth of 104.43%. The company attributed these positive results to its ongoing efforts to optimize production organization and operational management, alongside benefiting from a significant increase in gold prices compared to the previous year.

data.title: Ethereum network's 24-hour transaction fees reached $2.7 million, surpassing Hyperliquid.
data.description: According to Artemis data, Ethereum earned $2.7 million in transaction fees in 24 hours, ahead of Hyperliquid's $1.7 million.
